app.title: KPB Admin
app.tagline: Student requests, counseling, content, and operational follow-up.

shell.description: Mobile-facing content, case operations, and team workflows live from this workspace.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use your KPB email to access the operations workspace.

overview.title: Overview
overview.submittedThisWeekHint: New submissions over the last 7 days
overview.focusItem1: Unify all serious student requests under My Cases.
overview.focusItem2: Launch support offers and destination coverage by market.
overview.focusItem3: Segment reminder campaigns for missing documents.
overview.focusItem4: Track counselor response times and conversion to premium support.
overview.permBody: Admins manage platform operations, counselors move cases forward, commercials own follow-up, and content/moderation roles keep the student-facing surfaces fresh and safe.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.body: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again, or contact the platform team if it persists.
errors.notFoundBody: The page you are looking for does not exist or has moved.
